description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set on a large rectangular plot with a spacious green lawn and scattered trees. The building features a flat roof, white exterior walls, and large windows, with a swimming pool and patio area adjacent to the main structure. The layout includes a driveway leading to the house, and a small outbuilding or shed is visible on the property. The garden is landscaped with both mature and young trees, and there is a circular fire pit or planter near the front. The bungalow's design emphasizes open outdoor living spaces, with clear separation between the residential area and the expansive yard. The overall aesthetic is clean, minimalistic, and contemporary, with a focus on outdoor amenities and natural surroundings.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, white exterior, large windows, and a swimming pool, set on a landscaped plot with trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and a large green lawn with scattered trees and a circular feature near the front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the swimming pool, patio area, and the arrangement of trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, the pool, and the expansive lawn with trees and a small outbuilding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full length of the lawn, the bungalow's rear facade, and the driveway leading to the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
